code:
import io
import string

let content = io.read_to_end()
let lines = string.split(content, "\n")
let n = lines.len()
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let is_last = i == n - 1
  match lines.get(i)
  when Some(line)
    if is_last and string.is_empty(line)
      i = i
    else
      println("[#{i}] #{line}")
    end
  when None
    i = i
  end
  i = i + 1
end
